title: FabricationInstructionSimulationInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for simulation and verification workers that check generated or imported fabrication instructions against machine envelopes, process state, toolpath geometry, thermal/material requirements, workholding, support media, and human-intervention boundaries before release readiness.

FabricationSimulationInstructionArtifact.title: FabricationSimulationInstructionArtifact
FabricationSimulationInstructionArtifact.description: Generated or imported instruction artifact that needs simulation, dry-run review, machine-envelope checks, or process verification.

artifactKind.description: Instruction kind such as printer-gcode, mill-nc, lathe-cycle, router-gcode, sheet-cutting-job, waterjet-job, setup-sheet, tool-list, slicer-project, or operator-instruction.

format.description: Artifact format such as GCODE, NC, TAP, 3MF, BAMBUPROJECT, DXF, SVG, JSON, MD, TXT, or SHOP_TEXT.

uri.description: Sanitized artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the instruction artifact when available.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this instruction when known.

controllerDialect.description: Controller, firmware, or dialect label such as Marlin, Klipper, Fanuc, Haas, LinuxCNC, GRBL, Heidenhain, Okuma, Bambu, Prusa, or vendor-specific.

previewLines.description: Short non-secret preview lines or summaries retained for operator review.

evidence.description: Evidence labels already attached to this instruction, such as generated-by-cam, imported-program-reviewed, setup-sheet-linked, tool-list-linked, or simulation-required.

FabricationSimulationMachineContext.title: FabricationSimulationMachineContext
FabricationSimulationMachineContext.description: Machine, controller, fixture, material, and process context used during simulation or verification.

machineClass.description: Machine class such as additive-fdm, additive-resin, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, laser, waterjet, plasma, postprocess-station, inspection, or assembly.

axisLimits.description: Axis, build-volume, travel, chuck, sheet, stock, or rotary limits used by simulation.

processLimits.description: Process limits such as max feed, max spindle speed, max nozzle temp, abrasive pressure, beam power, coolant state, support media, or fixture clearance.

knownEvidence.description: Evidence labels available before simulation, such as workholding-reviewed, material-conditioned, tool-list-reviewed, fixture-model-loaded, or profile-released.

FabricationSimulationScope.title: FabricationSimulationScope
FabricationSimulationScope.description: One requested simulation, dry-run, or verification scope.

instructionId.description: Instruction artifact id to simulate or verify.

scopeKind.description: Scope kind such as machine-envelope, toolpath-geometry, thermal-state, material-state, workholding, support-media, collision, modal-state, arc-geometry, cutter-comp, extruder-state, canned-cycle, partoff-support, or human-intervention-boundary.

checks.description: Specific checks requested inside this scope.

requiredEvidence.description: Evidence labels required to clear this simulation scope.

FabricationSimulationEnvelopeCheck.title: FabricationSimulationEnvelopeCheck
FabricationSimulationEnvelopeCheck.description: One machine, build, travel, stock, fixture, or process envelope check result.

machineId.description: Machine id used for the check.

instructionId.description: Instruction id associated with the check when applicable.

checkKind.description: Check kind such as axis-travel, build-volume, stock-envelope, fixture-clearance, spindle-speed, feed-rate, thermal-state, support-media, material-flow, collision, or controller-modal-state.

status.description: Check status such as pass, fail, warning, skipped, blocked, or human-review-required.

metrics.description: Compact metric labels or key=value summaries such as maxX=118.2, minZ=-1.8, clearanceMm=0.7, maxFeedMmMin=1800, or nozzleTempWait=missing.

evidence.description: Evidence labels emitted or consumed by this check.

FabricationSimulationFinding.title: FabricationSimulationFinding
FabricationSimulationFinding.description: A simulation or verification finding that may become a release blocker, warning, improvement input, or learning signal.

severity.description: Severity such as blocker, high, medium, low, warning, or info.

findingKind.description: Finding kind such as collision, envelope, thermal-state, material-state, workholding, support-media, modal-state, arc-geometry, cutter-comp, tool-change, feed-rate, partoff-support, or human-intervention.

message.description: Human-readable finding summary safe for logs and operator review.

instructionId.description: Instruction id associated with this finding when known.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this finding when known.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this finding when known.

segmentRef.description: Toolpath segment, line range, layer, operation, cycle, or instruction reference when available.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on release posture, e.g. blocks-machine-ready, needs-operator-review, warning-only, simulation-only, or learning-only.

FabricationSimulationFailureBoundary.title: FabricationSimulationFailureBoundary
FabricationSimulationFailureBoundary.description: Boundary where the simulated machine or process cannot proceed safely without human intervention, different sequencing, extra evidence, or part splitting/combining.

boundaryKind.description: Boundary kind such as human-intervention, machine-envelope, toolpath-collision, thermal-state, workholding, support-media, material-flow, controller-state, partoff-support, split-required, combine-required, or inspection-required.

message.description: Human-readable boundary summary safe for logs.

instructionId.description: Instruction id associated with this boundary when known.

operationId.description: Operation id associated with this boundary when known.

machineId.description: Machine id associated with this boundary when known.

humanInterventionRequired.description: True when the boundary requires explicit human action or review.

recommendedAction.description: Recommended action such as add-workholding-evidence, wait-for-temperature, rehome-machine, add-support-media, split-part, combine-pieces, rerun-cam, request-inspection, or reject-release.

FabricationSimulationArtifact.title: FabricationSimulationArtifact
FabricationSimulationArtifact.description: Simulation or verification artifact retained for release readiness, review, or learning.

artifactKind.description: Artifact kind such as simulation-report, envelope-report, collision-map, layer-preview, material-flow-report, controller-trace, toolpath-preview, dry-run-log, or release-evidence.

instructionId.description: Instruction id this artifact describes when applicable.

uri.description: Sanitized artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the artifact when available.

format.description: Artifact format such as JSON, HTML, PNG, PDF, MD, TXT, CSV, GCODE, or NC.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this artifact.

FabricationInstructionSimulationRequest.title: FabricationInstructionSimulationRequest
FabricationInstructionSimulationRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.simulation.requests for simulation and verification workers.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-simulation.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this simulation job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that spawned this simulation job.

jobId.description: Optional fabrication job id when the planner has already persisted one.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.simulation.results.

instructions.description: Instruction artifacts that need simulation or verification.

knownEvidence.description: Evidence labels the planner already has before simulation.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent simulation work.

FabricationInstructionSimulationResult.title: FabricationInstructionSimulationResult
FabricationInstructionSimulationResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.instructions.simulation.results with envelope checks, findings, failure boundaries, simulation artifacts, warnings, and release posture.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.instruction-simulation.result.v1.

requestId.description: Instruction simulation request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original simulation request.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the simulation worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

simulator.description: Simulator, dry-run adapter, parser, controller model, or verification engine used.

simulatorVersion.description: Simulator or adapter version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed the requested simulation or verification work.

machineReady.description: True only when simulated instructions and retained evidence are sufficient for release readiness.

envelopeChecks.description: Machine, build, travel, stock, fixture, and process envelope checks.

findings.description: Simulation findings emitted by the worker.

failureBoundaries.description: Machine-failure and human-intervention boundaries found during simulation.

artifacts.description: Simulation artifacts retained for release readiness, review, or learning.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings that should be retained with simulation evidence.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as simulator profile, controller dialect, machine profile, sampled segments, confidence, or dry-run summary.
